news.summary: Canadian mining company Dundee Precious Metals (OTCPK: DPMLF) has acknowledged talks regarding the potential acquisition of UK-based Adriatic Metals (OTC: ADMFL) after rumors surfaced in the market. Dundee has stated that while discussions are ongoing, there is no guarantee that an offer will be presented or the terms it may entail. According to Sky News, the acquisition could value Adriatic, which primarily operates in the Western Balkans region, at approximately $935 million. Last year, speculation surrounded these two companies as well, but no official statements were released at the time. Dundee, headquartered in Toronto, has operations in Ecuador, Bulgaria, and Serbia, areas that align with Adriatic's regional focus. Specializing in sustainable gold production, Dundee aims to expand into the realm of mid-tier precious metals.
news.headline: Canadian miner Dundee Precious Metals eyes acquiring UK-based Adriatic Metals for $935M, discussions ongoing.

news.summary: IntellaTriage, a top provider of after-hours nurse-first triage solutions in the nation, has appointed James Lezzer as the VP of Interoperability. The company, located in BRENTWOOD, Tenn., made this announcement on May 22, 2025. This move comes especially significant as IntellaTriage continues to expand its reach, with over XX% market share in the industry.
news.headline: IntellaTriage appoints James Lezzer as VP of Interoperability to improve integration, enhance client experience.

news.summary: Paige Bueckers, a rookie for the Dallas Wings, recently showcased the color Radiant Lilac SW 0074, named The Loneliest Color™, in a unique outfit created by Dapper Dan. This event took place on May 22, 2025 in Cleveland. The paint color was provided by The Sherwin-Williams Company, emphasizing the beauty of all colors, including this one.
news.headline: Sherwin-Williams unveils "The Loneliest Color™" 2025 with Dallas Wings Rookie Paige Bueckers debuting Radiant Lilac SW 0074.

news.summary: Taco Bell and Mike's Hot Honey ® have collaborated to revamp the hot honey taste, offering a fresh and spicy dipping encounter for the beloved Crispy Chicken Nuggets. This partnership brings a new level of heat and sweetness to Taco Bell's crispy chicken lineup, creating an exciting experience for fans.
news.headline: Taco Bell introduces new hot honey Diablo sauce in partnership with Mike's Hot Honey, enhancing crispy chicken nuggets.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, TNL Mediagene (Nasdaq: TNMG), a digital media and data group headquartered in Tokyo, disclosed that The Benchmark Company, LLC has commenced research coverage on the company. TNL Mediagene operates in Asia and is recognized for its next-generation approach to digital media. This move signifies a milestone for the company as it aims to expand its visibility within the industry and attract potential investors. For more information on this development, interested parties can refer to the official announcement.
news.headline: TNL Mediagene (Nasdaq: TNMG) gains research coverage by Benchmark, a Tokyo-based digital media and data group.

news.summary: A popular cannabis edible brand, Wyld, has recently introduced its new product, Hemp-Derived Delta-9 THC Sparkling Waters, in select markets and online. This launch, which took place on May 22, 2025, boasts seven unique flavors and offers consumers two potency options to choose from. Wyld, known as the top cannabis edible brand in the U.S., has expanded its product line to cater to the growing demand for cannabis-infused beverages. Available in select markets and online, these sparkling waters are set to make waves in the industry with their innovative blend of flavors and potency options.
news.headline: Wyld launches THC-infused sparkling waters with 7 flavors and 2 potency options. #1 US cannabis edible brand.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking collaboration, Zenity and Microsoft Copilot Studio have joined forces to provide comprehensive security solutions for enterprises looking to expand their AI Agent usage. This partnership aims to enhance scalability while ensuring visibility, control, and real-time threat protection. The announcement was made on May 22, 2025, in TEL AVIV, Israel. Zenity, recognized as a top-tier platform for end-to-end security and governance in AI technology, and Microsoft Copilot Studio are expected to empower organizations with advanced security features. This partnership signifies a pivotal advancement in safeguarding AI initiatives and promoting secure adoption.
news.headline: Zenity partners with Microsoft to boost security for enterprise AI agents, offering end-to-end protection for scale.

news.summary: The 2025 winners of the Next Generation Short Story Awards have been unveiled in Philadelphia. This prestigious not-for-profit international program has recognized outstanding short stories from talented authors. The event, held on May 22, revealed the top picks for this year's Short Story Awards. The winning stories showcase the creativity and skill of writers, highlighting diverse and engaging narratives. The awards celebrate literary excellence and provide a platform for emerging storytellers to share their work with a global audience. Congratulations to all the winners of the 2025 Next Generation Short Story Awards for their contributions to the world of literature.
news.headline: Winners of 2025 Next Generation Short Story Awards announced in Philadelphia, honoring outstanding authors globally.

news.summary: In Bozeman, Montana, global analytics software leader FICO revealed that Octane (Octane Lending, Inc.) has been honored with a 2025 FICO® Decision Award for Customer Onboarding and Management. Octane, a fintech company that is changing the purchasing process for significant recreational acquisitions, has collaborated with FICO since 2016 to enhance risk management and enable the responsible growth of credit availability. Octane's innovative digital solutions have revolutionized the financing process in recreational markets.
news.headline: Octane wins 2025 FICO Decision Award for Customer Onboarding and Management, helping expand credit access. #FICO #Octane #Fintech

news.summary: Boost Mobile's impressive 5G performance in key U.S. cities has been validated by the latest Opensignal report. Issued on May 22, 2025, in LITTLETON, Colo., the report establishes Boost Mobile's position as a frontrunner in the realm of 5G connectivity. This independent assessment revealed substantial improvements in Boost Mobile's real-world 5G speeds within major urban centers nationwide. This affirmation underscores Boost Mobile's commitment to delivering top-tier service to its customers.
news.headline: Boost Mobile ranks 1st in 5G coverage and availability across 7 major U.S. cities in Opensignal report. Benchmark set.

news.summary: Mercedes-Benz has declared Atlanta as its headquarters in North America and will relocate corporate roles to its 1MB facility in Sandy Springs, Ga. from Farmington Hills, Mich. This decision includes an investment of millions in a new Research & Development center in Metro Atlanta for technical teams across the U.S. This move will bring around 500 jobs to the area, showcasing the company's commitment to growth and innovation.
news.headline: Mercedes-Benz to make Atlanta North American headquarters, move 500 roles to Georgia, invest in R&D hub, multi-million dollar investment.

news.summary: Galmed Pharmaceuticals Ltd. reported financial results for the first quarter of 2025, showcasing a cash balance of approximately $20.1 million, with a net loss of around $1.1 million for the period. The company raised $6.5 million since the beginning of 2025. Research and development expenses amounted to about $0.6 million, with general and administrative expenses totaling approximately $0.6 million. Galmed's focus remains on developing Aramchol for liver disease treatment and expanding into oncological indications. The company aims to diversify its product pipeline targeting cardiometabolic indications. Forward-looking statements warn of inherent risks to anticipated events, and potential factors include the development and approval of new drug candidates and regulatory actions. While financial results were not audited, the company's current assets as of March 31, 2025, totaled $16.3 million. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Galmed Pharmaceuticals reports Q1 2025 financials: raised $6.5 million, cash balance $20.1 million, net loss $1.1 million.

news.summary: A company based in Norwalk, Connecticut, cieTrade, which specializes in business management software for commodity traders, pulp, paper, and recycling firms, has revealed a new integration with Stripe. This collaboration allows cieTrade's customers to conveniently accept payments using credit cards or ACH via Stripe's secure platform. By opting for this feature, cieTrade clients can automate their accounts receivable processes with ease.
news.headline: cieTrade now offers integration with Stripe for automated payment processing, enabling clients to receive instant payments via credit card or ACH.

news.summary: Decibel Cannabis Company Inc. announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. Key highlights include a net revenue of $21.2 million, with a year-over-year increase of 1.4%. The company reduced accounts payables by $2.5 million and debt by $0.8 million during this period. Net Canadian recreational sales were $19.0 million, down by 8%, largely due to increased competition in infused pre-roll products. International sales saw a substantial increase of 527% to $2.2 million, driven by contributions from AgMedica. Gross margin before fair value adjustments was 50%, and adjusted EBITDA stood at $3.5 million. Despite a year-over-year decrease in free cash flow and an increase in adjusted net loss, the company expects significant improvements moving forward. Key fiscal year 2025 expectations include a net revenue of $130 million, adjusted EBITDA of $25 million, and adjusted free cash flow of $20 million. Decibel aims to increase exports to 9 markets and continue deleveraging with a debt to adjusted EBITDA ratio of less than 1.4x. For further details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Decibel Cannabis Company reports Q1 results: $21.2M net revenue, $25M adjusted EBITDA, $130M 2025 net revenue goal.

news.summary: In Spain, Fluidra, a prominent company specializing in pool and wellness solutions, has announced its involvement in expanding aquatic sports with investments exceeding €10 million across four new projects in various countries. Notably, in Paraguay, the company is overseeing the development of the future Olympic Aquatic Center, where the upcoming Asunción Junior Pan American Games will be held from August 9 to 23, 2025. Part of this initiative includes constructing an Olympic-sized pool tailored for water polo and other aquatic activities. Additionally, Fluidra is engaged in similar ventures in Italy, Romania, and India to further its presence in the aquatic sports sector.
news.headline: Fluidra is increasing its involvement in aquatic sports with projects in Paraguay, Italy, Romania, and India worth over €10 million. In Paraguay, Fluidra is constructing an Olympic Aquatic Center for the Asunción Junior Pan American Games in 2025.

news.summary: Dallas-based company Cognigy, specializing in AI-driven customer service solutions, has attained Microsoft Solutions Partner status with Certified Software, the top-tier partnership level in Microsoft's AI Cloud Partner Program. This achievement highlights Cognigy's effectiveness in aiding leading brands leverage AI to enhance support efficiency, minimize wait times, and boost customer satisfaction in the Microsoft environment. As a premier partner, Cognigy will collaborate extensively with Microsoft to further advance these capabilities.
news.headline: Cognigy becomes Microsoft Solutions Partner with Certified Software, aiding Azure customers with AI agents, enhancing support.
